name: IdsEdwSubSbsdyIncmFBal

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.PROD_ID, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.PROD_BILL_CMPNT_ID, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_COV_DUE_DT_SK, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_COV_STRT_DT_SK, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_PRM_TYP_CD, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_CRT_DTM, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_BILL_DISP_CD, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SUB_SBSDY_AMT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F ON SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.SUB_UNIQ_KEY = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.SUB_UNIQ_KEY AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.PROD_ID = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.PROD_ID AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.PROD_BILL_CMPNT_ID = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.PROD_BILL_CMPNT_ID AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_COV_DUE_DT_SK = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_COV_DUE_DT_SK AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_COV_STRT_DT_SK = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_COV_STRT_DT_SK AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_PRM_TYP_CD = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_PRM_TYP_CD AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_CRT_DTM = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_CRT_DTM AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_BILL_DISP_CD = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SBSDY_BILL_DISP_CD AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD = B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD WHERE SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SUB_SBSDY_AMT <> B_SUB_SBSDY_INCM_F.INVC_SUB_SUB_SBSDY_AMT) SELECT * FROM cte

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.cdf74_TMP_IdsEdwSubSbsdyIncmFBal_Notify; IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.cdf74_TMP_IdsEdwSubSbsdyIncmFBal) BEGIN SELECT 'COLUMN SUM BALANCING IDS - EDW SUB SBSDY INCM F OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.cdf74_TMP_IdsEdwSubSbsdyIncmFBal_Notify; END
